name: Datadog
description: Logs, metrics, monitors, incidents, and observability workflows.
notes: Uses Datadog's official hosted MCP server. The default registration targets the US1 endpoint and can be edited for other Datadog sites.

headerFields.label: Datadog API key
headerFields.helperText: Created in Datadog under Organization Settings → API Keys. Used to authenticate to the Datadog MCP server. See the [setup docs](https://docs.datadoghq.com/mcp_server/setup/?tab=other#authentication).

headerFields.label: Datadog Application key
headerFields.helperText: Created in Datadog under Organization Settings → Application Keys. Grants the MCP server access to your Datadog data. See the [setup docs](https://docs.datadoghq.com/mcp_server/setup/?tab=other#authentication).
